memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Item

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Item

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ItemId, FString const &Language, FString const &Region, THandler< FAccelByteModelsPopulatedItemInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &StoreId=TEXT(""), bool bPopulateBundle=false, bool AutoCalcEstimatedPrice=false)
memberdef.name: GetItemById

briefdescription.para: Get one item information from an online store.

parameterdescription.para: The item ID.
ISO 639-1 language tag, e.g., "en, "zh". @param Region ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country tag, e.g., "US", "CN".
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPopulatedItemInfo&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If it's leaved string empty, the value will be got from published store id on the namespace.
Whether populate bundled items if it's a bundle, default value is false.
This will Auto Calculate Estimated Price. Default is false, if autoCalcEstimatedPrice is true and item is flexible bundle, will auto calc price.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AppId, FString const &Language, FString const &Region, THandler< FAccelByteModelsItemInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetItemByAppId

briefdescription.para: Get one item information from an online store.

parameterdescription.para: The App ID.
ISO 639-1 language tag, e.g., "en, "zh". @param Region ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country tag, e.g., "US", "CN".
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsPopulatedItemInfo&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsItemCriteria const &ItemCriteria, int32 Offset, int32 Limit, THandler< FAccelByteModelsItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, TArray< EAccelByteItemListSortBy > const &SortBy={}, FString const &StoreId=TEXT(""), bool AutoCalcEstimatedPrice=false)
memberdef.name: GetItemsByCriteria

briefdescription.para: Get an array of items with specific criteria/filter from online store.

parameterdescription.para: should be contain some parameters for query.
Page number.
Page size.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsItemPagingSlicedResult&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

Make sure to always use more than one sort if the first sort is not an unique value for example, if you wish to sort by displayOrder, make sure to include other sort such as name or createdAt after the first sort, eg: displayOrder:asc,name:asc if it leave with empty array, it will be set to default value: name:asc,displayOrder:asc

The Store Id, default value is published store id. Note that It will only one available published store in each game namespace, if you assigned this with other, means you will be able to expose items on draft store. Nonetheless it will only user who has SANDBOX role (set on AP) and has permission and ability to hit this end point with other StoreId value.
This will Auto Calculate Estimated Price. Default is false, if autoCalcEstimatedPrice is true and item is flexible bundle, will auto calc price.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Language, FString const &Keyword, int32 Offset, int32 Limit, FString const &Region, THandler< FAccelByteModelsItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool AutoCalcEstimatedPrice=false)
memberdef.name: SearchItem

briefdescription.para: Search items by keyword in title, description and long description from published store. Language constrained. If item does not exist in the specified region, default region item will be returned.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsItemPagingSlicedResult&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will Auto Calculate Estimated Price. Default is false, if autoCalcEstimatedPrice is true and item is flexible bundle, will auto calc price.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Sku, FString const &Language, FString const &Region, THandler< FAccelByteModelsItemInfo > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, bool AutoCalcEstimatedPrice=false)
memberdef.name: GetItemBySku

briefdescription.para: Get Item information by SKU number from an online store.

parameterdescription.para: should contain specific number of item Sku.
ISO 639-1 language tag, e.g., "en, "zh". @param Region ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country tag, e.g., "US", "CN".
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsItemInfo&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
This will Auto Calculate Estimated Price. Default is false, if autoCalcEstimatedPrice is true and item is flexible bundle, will auto calc price.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &ItemId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsItemDynamicData > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetItemDynamicData

briefdescription.para: Get Dynamic Data information from specified Item.

parameterdescription.para: The Item ID.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsItemDynamicData&.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< FString > &ItemIds, FString const &Region, FString const &Language, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsItemInfo > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, FString const &StoreId=TEXT(""), bool AutoCalcEstimatedPrice=false)
memberdef.name: BulkGetLocaleItems

briefdescription.para: Get Item information by SKU number from an online store.

parameterdescription.para: ItemId array.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country tag, e.g., "US", "CN".
ISO 639-1 language tag, e.g., "en, "zh".
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is const FAccelByteModelsItemInfo&.
This will be called when the operation failed.
If it's leaved string empty, the value will be got from published store id on the namespace.
This will Auto Calculate Estimated Price. Default is false, if autoCalcEstimatedPrice is true and item is flexible bundle, will auto calc price.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Get list all stores in a namespace.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is array of FAccelByteModelsPlatformStore.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< FString > &ItemIds, FString const &Region, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsEstimatedPrices > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetEstimatedPrice

parameterdescription.para: The item's IDs to check, commas separated item ids.
Region Code, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country tag, e.g., "US", "CN".
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is TArray<FAccelByteModelsEstimatedPrices>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelBytePlatformMapping Platform, THandler< FAccelByteModelsItemMappingsResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetItemMappings

briefdescription.para: Retrieve other supported platform store items mapping.

parameterdescription.para: The type of the platform.
This will be called when the operation succeeded.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Item API for buying things from the online store. An item represents a single product sold in the online store. Each category has items inside it. You can get a list of items by criteria or by its ID.
